source_jobs.title: Lead Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US



Leona is on a mission to empower everyone to take the best care of themselves, their patients, and their loved ones. We have an ambitious goal: to transform the way the world interacts with healthcare, because where you live shouldn't determine the quality of care you receive.



For patients, managing your health should feel empowering, not intimidating. For doctors, we want to eliminate the administrative noise so you can focus on what matters most: delivering exceptional care. We're reimagining what it looks like for doctors to care for patients in an AI-first world — starting with a platform that streamlines doctor-patient communication via WhatsApp, acting as an AI clinical assistant that automates non-urgent tasks, surfaces what's urgent, and gives patients the convenience of reaching their care team 24/7.



With bases in San Francisco and Mexico City, our team brings together years of experience scaling companies like Uber, Rappi, Modern Fertility, and Wonder across the US and Latin America. We're backed by a16z, General Catalyst, and Accel, and a remarkable group of angels including the founders of Nubank, Rappi, and Maven Clinic.



If you're hungry to build 0-to-1, and roll up your sleeves to make magic, thrive in ambiguity, and care deeply about building a better future, this role might be the perfect fit for you.




THE ROLE 



Location: San Francisco or Mexico City, but we can be flexible for the right candidate



We seek an experienced product designer to lead the design of a new tool aimed at giving doctors superpowers. If you’re driven by user experience, enjoy the challenge of solving complex design problems with easy-to-use solutions, and are looking to play a critical role in taking a product from 0 to 1, this role is for you.



In this role, you will:

 - Lead the design of high-end, impactful product experiences for Leona’s digital products

 - Spend time getting to know our target users and develop empathy for their unique needs

 - Collaborate closely with cross-functional stakeholders

 - Be a key decision-maker on a small but talented team

 - Help us make Leona a company that stands out for its design excellence




REQUIREMENTS:

 - Has a proven track record of designing mobile-first digital products, with at least 7 years of relevant work experience 

 - Spanish & English language fluency

 - Specific experience designing for native mobile apps (iOS or Android), with extensive knowledge of common design patterns + guidelines. Has experience designing user experiences for complex native mobile applications, and has extensive knowledge of common design patterns + guidelines

 - Mastery of the various tools needed for each step of the design process

 - Feels comfortable taking ideas from wireframes to pixel-perfect deliverables, and is excited about defining and owning this process

 - Experience working closely with engineers

 - Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

 - A passion for building




WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT: 

 - Autonomy & Responsibility: You will take ownership of your time and efforts, prioritizing the activities that have the largest impact for the company 

 - Team Collaboration: We are very team oriented; you’ll have the opportunity to work with a small, nimble team of superstars, gaining insight into building a company from scratch. Everyone in the team is here to help each other - 24/7. 

 - Mentorship: The team members are here to support your career growth goals within the company and afterwards 

 - Ambiguity: There are a lot of unknowns given the early stage of the company, you will be responsible for navigating ambiguous environments and determining the best path forward 

 - Dedication: If you prefer 9-5 environments, this role is not for you. While there is no strict ‘clocking in/clocking out’ schedule, the aggressive growth goals require the team to work more than 8 hours a day 

 - Flexibility & Generous Benefits: Unlimited vacation policy, healt

source_jobs.title: Head of Growth
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US



Leona is on a mission to empower everyone to take the best care of themselves, their patients, and their loved ones. We have an ambitious goal: to transform the way the world interacts with healthcare, because where you live shouldn't determine the quality of care you receive.



For patients, managing your health should feel empowering, not intimidating. For doctors, we want to eliminate the administrative noise so you can focus on what matters most: delivering exceptional care. We're reimagining what it looks like for doctors to care for patients in an AI-first world — starting with a platform that streamlines doctor-patient communication via WhatsApp, acting as an AI clinical assistant that automates non-urgent tasks, surfaces what's urgent, and gives patients the convenience of reaching their care team 24/7.



With bases in San Francisco and Mexico City, our team brings together years of experience scaling companies like Uber, Rappi, Modern Fertility, and Wonder across the US and Latin America. We're backed by a16z, General Catalyst, and Accel, and a remarkable group of angels including the founders of Nubank, Rappi, and Maven Clinic.



If you're hungry to build 0-to-1, and roll up your sleeves to make magic, thrive in ambiguity, and care deeply about building a better future, this role might be the perfect fit for you.




THE ROLE



Location: Mexico City



We've found early traction through relentless hustle. Now we need someone to turn that hustle into a repeatable growth engine. You'll own everything between "a doctor has never heard of Leona" and "a doctor can't imagine practicing without it"—acquisition, activation, retention, and referral. That's the system you'll build.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own the Growth Engine: Own the entire doctor journey, from awareness to activation, retention, and referral.

 - Find Scalable Acquisition Channels: Run rapid experiments across outbound, partnerships, referrals, paid, SEO, events, and other channels to discover repeatable, efficient growth.

 - Turn Users into Customers: Obsess over activation and help design onboarding experiences the let users experience Leona's value as quickly as possible.

 - Use Data to Drive Decisions: Define the metrics that matter, build dashboards, talk to customers, and make growth decisions based on evidence.

 - Shape the Product: Work closely with the founders and product team to bring customer insights into product decisions and influence what gets built next.

 - Build the Growth Team: Hire exceptional people, develop scalable playbooks and systems, and create a growth function that becomes a long-term competitive advantage.




IN YOUR FIRST 90 DAYS, YOU WILL:

 - Launch acquisition experiments across partnerships, outbound, paid, referrals, and other channels to quickly identify which channels most efficiently accelerate the Leona flywheel.

 - Rework the doctor onboarding experience so new users understand Leona's value within days, not weeks.

 - Build the dashboards and operating cadence that become the company's source of truth for acquisition, activation, and retention.

 - Develop a clear point of view on where Leona's next phase of scalable growth will come from.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

The best person for this role may never have had the title "Head of Growth." They may have founded a company, been employee #5 at a startup, or built a business as a side project. What matters is that you've built something from nothing and can point to the numbers you personally moved.

 - 5+ years of experience, ideally in an early-stage startup

 - Proven experience driving growth in a 0→1 environment

 - Demonstrated history of exceptional performance and rapid career progression

 - You've built something from scratch, it could be a company, product, side project, or growth engine, and can clearly articulate the metrics you personally owned and improved

 - You've attracted exceptional people to join you before you had me

source_jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer - Backend
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US



Leona is on a mission to empower everyone to take the best care of themselves, their patients, and their loved ones. We have an ambitious goal: to transform the way the world interacts with healthcare, because where you live shouldn't determine the quality of care you receive.



For patients, managing your health should feel empowering, not intimidating. For doctors, we want to eliminate the administrative noise so you can focus on what matters most: delivering exceptional care. We're reimagining what it looks like for doctors to care for patients in an AI-first world — starting with a platform that streamlines doctor-patient communication via WhatsApp, acting as an AI clinical assistant that automates non-urgent tasks, surfaces what's urgent, and gives patients the convenience of reaching their care team 24/7.



With bases in San Francisco and Mexico City, our team brings together years of experience scaling companies like Uber, Rappi, Modern Fertility, and Wonder across the US and Latin America. We're backed by a16z, General Catalyst, and Accel, and a remarkable group of angels including the founders of Nubank, Rappi, and Maven Clinic.



If you're hungry to build 0-to-1, and roll up your sleeves to make magic, thrive in ambiguity, and care deeply about building a better future, this role might be the perfect fit for you.




TECH CHALLENGE



We’re looking for an experienced software engineer to help us shape and scale Leona. Leona is reimagining how the world interacts with care — starting with doctor-patient communication on WhatsApp. We are building an an AI-powered platform that automates clinical workflows to empower doctors to save time, reduce burnout, and deliver better, more personalized care at scale. Patients today expect round-the-clock access to personalized care, but doctors are stuck with outdated, fragmented tools; Leona bridges that gap with intelligent automation and seamless messaging. If you’re driven by tough engineering and user experience challenges, love wearing many hats, and thrive in taking products from 0 to 1, this role is for you.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Take full ownership of projects that are both technically complex and business-critical

 - Collaborate closely with design, operations, data science, and medical professionals to deliver impactful product experiences

 - Work side-by-side with our CTO to evolve our engineering strategy and improve how we build

 - Help shape technical direction and product decisions as a core member of a small, high-performing team




REQUIREMENTS

 - 6+ years of relevant experience, with a strong track record of building and scaling complex software systems (startup experience is a plus!)

 - Deep expertise in backend development using modern technologies (we use Python on the backend; clients are built in Flutter), and familiarity with managing production-scale infrastructure within AWS

 - Comfortable working across the stack and owning projects end-to-end — from idea to launch to scale

 - Strong understanding of modern AI technologies — you stay current with the tooling landscape and confidently apply AI/ML to real-world problems

 - Excellent communication and collaboration skills

 - A builder’s mindset and love for creating things that make a difference



We’d love to work with someone who:

 - Thrives in ambiguity and fast-moving environments

 - Loves collaborating with talented cross-functional teammates

 - Is energized by the challenges and opportunities of early-stage startups

 - Is mission-driven and passionate about improving health outcomes

 - Is curious, resourceful, and always looking to innovate
   
   

Bonus points for:

 - Experience in health tech or building communication tools (messaging, collaboration, etc.)

 - Spanish fluency

source_jobs.title: Growth and Operations
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US



Leona is on a mission to empower everyone to take the best care of themselves, their patients, and their loved ones. We have an ambitious goal: to transform the way the world interacts with healthcare, because where you live shouldn't determine the quality of care you receive.



For patients, managing your health should feel empowering, not intimidating. For doctors, we want to eliminate the administrative noise so you can focus on what matters most: delivering exceptional care. We're reimagining what it looks like for doctors to care for patients in an AI-first world — starting with a platform that streamlines doctor-patient communication via WhatsApp, acting as an AI clinical assistant that automates non-urgent tasks, surfaces what's urgent, and gives patients the convenience of reaching their care team 24/7.



With bases in San Francisco and Mexico City, our team brings together years of experience scaling companies like Uber, Rappi, Modern Fertility, and Wonder across the US and Latin America. We're backed by a16z, General Catalyst, and Accel, and a remarkable group of angels including the founders of Nubank, Rappi, and Maven Clinic.



If you're hungry to build 0-to-1, and roll up your sleeves to make magic, thrive in ambiguity, and care deeply about building a better future, this role might be the perfect fit for you.




THE ROLE

You'll work at the intersection of growth, operations, product, and customer experience.

You'll spend time understanding our doctors, analyzing performance data, improving onboarding and activation, designing scalable processes, and helping leadership make better decisions. No two weeks will look the same.

This is an ideal role for someone who wants to learn how an early-stage startup operates and gain exposure to every part of the business while having meaningful ownership from day one.




WHAT YOU'LL DO


DRIVE DOCTOR ACTIVATION & GROWTH

 - Guide doctors through onboarding, from signup to successful activation

 - Become an expert on our onboarding funnel and identify opportunities to improve conversion and engagement

 - Act as a trusted point of contact for a portfolio of doctors during their first weeks on Leona

 - Collect customer insights and translate them into product and operational improvements




ANALYZE PERFORMANCE & DRIVE DECISIONS

 - Build dashboards and reports that help leadership understand business performance

 - Monitor key metrics across onboarding, activation, engagement, and retention

 - Identify trends, bottlenecks, and opportunities through data analysis

 - Present recommendations and insights to stakeholders




BUILD SCALABLE OPERATIONS

 - Design and improve processes that enable Leona to scale efficiently

 - Partner with product, growth, operations, and engineering teams to launch new initiatives

 - Lead cross-functional projects from idea to execution

 - Develop systems that improve quality, speed, and reliability across the organization




SUPPORT STRATEGIC INITIATIVES

 - Conduct market and competitive research

 - Help evaluate new growth opportunities and business initiatives

 - Support leadership on high-priority strategic projects

 - Contribute to company planning and goal-setting processes




WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE


IN YOUR FIRST 30 DAYS

 - Become an expert in Leona's product, doctors, and operational workflows

 - Take ownership of onboarding and supporting new doctors

 - Build familiarity with our key metrics and dashboards




IN YOUR FIRST 90 DAYS

 - Own meaningful improvements to activation or onboarding performance

 - Launch at least one operational initiative that improves efficiency or customer experience

 - Become a trusted partner across growth, product, and operations teams

 - Deliver insights that influence company decisions




WHO YOU ARE

We're less interested in your years of experience and more interested in your ability to learn quickly, solve problems, and execute.

You might be:

 - A recent graduat

source_jobs.title: Head of Product, AI
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US



Leona is on a mission to empower everyone to take the best care of themselves, their patients, and their loved ones. We have an ambitious goal: to transform the way the world interacts with healthcare, because where you live shouldn't determine the quality of care you receive.



For patients, managing your health should feel empowering, not intimidating. For doctors, we want to eliminate the administrative noise so you can focus on what matters most: delivering exceptional care. We're reimagining what it looks like for doctors to care for patients in an AI-first world — starting with a platform that streamlines doctor-patient communication via WhatsApp, acting as an AI clinical assistant that automates non-urgent tasks, surfaces what's urgent, and gives patients the convenience of reaching their care team 24/7.



With bases in San Francisco and Mexico City, our team brings together years of experience scaling companies like Uber, Rappi, Modern Fertility, and Wonder across the US and Latin America. We're backed by a16z, General Catalyst, and Accel, and a remarkable group of angels including the founders of Nubank, Rappi, and Maven Clinic.



If you're hungry to build 0-to-1, and roll up your sleeves to make magic, thrive in ambiguity, and care deeply about building a better future, this role might be the perfect fit for you.



The Role

We're looking for a Head of Product, AI to help shape the future of Leona. This is a high-ownership role for someone equally excited by product strategy and hands-on execution. You'll partner directly with the founders to sharpen product thinking, push roadmap decisions forward, and bring clarity and rigor to a fast-moving team.

The ideal candidate is energized by ambiguity, deeply curious about the frontier of AI, and passionate about building products with intuitive user experiences. You have strong product taste, and instinctively know the difference between a product that works and one that genuinely delights.

This is not a role for someone who prefers structure handed to them. You'll define it.



What You'll Do

 - Partner closely with the founders on product strategy, roadmap, prioritization, and overall product direction

 - Help define AI-native user experiences that feel intuitive, trustworthy, and genuinely useful, abstracting away complexity so users never have to feel it

 - Talk to users constantly — doctors, clinical and administrative staff, and patients — to deeply understand pain points, behaviors, and unmet needs, then translate those insights into clear product decisions and shipped features

 - Stay deeply plugged into AI research, industry trends, and emergent applications, filtering signal from noise and applying it creatively to Leona's product

 - Navigate ambiguity head-on: form hypotheses, test them quickly, and update your approach when the data says you're wrong

 - Drive execution across engineering, design, operations, and leadership to keep the team aligned and moving fast

 - Work with growth to craft the story around new initiatives and drive successful product launches

 - Bring more communication, organization, and accountability to the product development process, while helping to build the product culture and operating rhythm of the company

 - Translate insights across cultures and markets, adapting product thinking for diverse healthcare contexts across countries in Latin America and beyond



What We're Looking For

 - 3+ years of product management experience at an early-stage startup

 - Strong grasp of AI products, with experience working on an AI-first product

 - Excellent communication skills, with ability to translate between technical and non-technical audiences

 - Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple workstreams, prioritize effectively, and drive execution in a fast-paced environment

 - Strong product judgment, especially around AI-native user experiences

 - Comfortable operating with high ownership and relativ

notes: Healthcare-focused startup with AI-first approach, strong product and engineering presence
